text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * Foster Children 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FOR THE CHILDREN ROYAL FAMILY KIDS CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides camps and mentoring programs for children who have experienced abuse, neglect, or abandonment. Offers individual attention with one counselor for every one or two children. Locator Santa Ana, CA 92704 Eligibility: Children ages 6-12 in foster care with an active child welfare case Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (714) 438-2494 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Oregon adoptive and assisted guardianship families with a schedule of support groups, parenting classes, and educational events 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: ODHS adoptive and assisted guardianship families, or families who have adopted through any state foster care system Hours: Varies by training course Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS
